display.purpose: Landing hero + section headlines and the wordmark. The only fluid clamp() type. Never body.

headline.purpose: App page titles and TipTap h1. Fixed rem — never scales fluidly.

title.purpose: Card titles, dialog headers, note titles in lists.

body.purpose: Default UI and prose text; prose caps 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Deliberate uppercase eyebrows/kickers — not stamped above every section.

shadows.name: resting-card
shadows.purpose: App cards at rest (shadow-sm). Maximum lift in-app.

shadows.name: landing-card
shadows.purpose: Landing light cards; hover warms toward indigo and lifts.

shadows.name: landing-panel-dark
shadows.purpose: Landing dark product mockups: inset top-highlight + deep drop.

shadows.name: ambient-glow
shadows.purpose: Landing-only atmosphere/aurora. Never a component shadow.

motion.name: ease-reveal
motion.purpose: Landing scroll reveals (ease-out-expo): fade + lift + un-blur. Content visible by default; JS opts in.

motion.name: hero-rise
motion.purpose: Staggered hero entrance (eyebrow → headline lines → subcopy → CTAs).

motion.name: aurora
motion.purpose: Slow low-amplitude drift on the hero glow. Reduced-motion: none.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: In-app state changes (hover, focus, permission toggle). Quick and quiet.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The note-taking primary action. Deep indigo on light.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(0.47 0.15 275); color: #fff; font: 600 14px/1 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.42 0.15 275); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.47 0.15 275 / 0.5); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Quiet default for secondary actions. Hairline border, fills accent on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.006 275); border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(0.99 0.002 275); color: oklch(0.27 0.012 275); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.05); font: 500 14px/1 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.955 0.02 285); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.47 0.15 275 / 0.5); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Delete and the decisive 'make private' action only.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: #f87070; color: #fff; font: 600 14px/1 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: #f45a5a; } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #f8707080; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: 36px field, hairline border, ring halo on focus. No glow, no color flood.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 36px; width: 100%; padding: 4px 12px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.006 275); border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; color: oklch(0.27 0.012 275); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.05); font: 400 14px/1.4 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.47 0.008 275); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.47 0.15 275); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.47 0.15 275 / 0.5); }

components.name: Landing Feature Card
components.description: Landing feature tile: layered shadow, indigo icon chip that fills on hover, lift on hover.
components.html:
Real identities only
Google or GitHub login, every time. Every cursor is a real, tracked person.
components.css: .ds-card { display: block; padding: 28px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.006 275); border-radius: 18px; background: #fff; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0.2 0.02 275 / 0.04), 0 10px 30px oklch(0.2 0.02 275 / 0.05); font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', -apple-system, sans-serif; transition: transform 260ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), border-color 260ms, box-shadow 260ms; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: oklch(0.47 0.15 275 / 0.35); box-shadow: 0 2px 6px oklch(0.47 0.15 275 / 0.08), 0 22px 50px oklch(0.47 0.15 275 / 0.14); } .ds-card-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 46px; height: 46px; margin-bottom: 18px; border-radius: 13px; background: oklch(0.47 0.15 275 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.47 0.15 275); transition: background 200ms, color 200ms; } .ds-card:hover .ds-card-icon { background: oklch(0.47 0.15 275); color: #fff; } .ds-card-title { margin-bottom: 8px; font: 700 19px/1.2 'Bricolage Grotesque', sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.3px; color: oklch(0.27 0.012 275); } .ds-card-body { font: 400 14px/1.6 'Hanken Grotesk', sans-serif; color: oklch(0.47 0.008 275); }

components.name: Live Presence Cursor
components.description: The signature component: a caret in the collaborator's stable presence color, always with a name label — never color alone.
components.css: .ds-presence { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: flex-end; } .ds-presence-caret { width: 2px; height: 16px; border-radius: 1px; background: #4ea8ff; animation: ds-caret-blink 1.1s step-end infinite; } .ds-presence-name { margin-left: 1px; padding: 1.5px 5px; border-radius: 3px 3px 3px 0; background: #4ea8ff; color: #fff; font: 700 9px/1.6 'Hanken Grotesk', sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; } @keyframes ds-caret-blink { 0%,44%{opacity:1} 50%,94%{opacity:0} 100%{opacity:1} } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-presence-caret { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview: Yapper is a dependable, grown-up place to write. The near-monochrome cool indigo-tinted surface is deliberately quiet so the two things that matter can be loud: the words you're writing and who's in the room with you. A single deep brand indigo and its brighter iris sibling are the only saturated voice, spent sparingly on identity and primary action. It is not a faceless link-trust tool, not a heavy enterprise console, not a generic AI-SaaS template, and not toy-cute. The app is flat by tonal layering; the always-dark marketing landing earns layered shadow, ambient glow, and orchestrated motion, in the same palette, type, and voice.
keyCharacteristics: Cool indigo-tinted neutrals carry 90%+ of every surface; brand/iris indigo is rationed.
Two distinctive families: Bricolage Grotesque (display) + Hanken Grotesk (text) — not the system-font reflex.
App is flat by tonal layering; the landing earns layered shadow + glow + orchestrated motion.
Identity is always legible: real names, stable per-user colors, never color alone.
Control is a switch, never a control panel.

rules.name: The Cool-Neutral Rule
rules.body: Neutrals carry a faint cool indigo tint (chroma ≤0.02 toward hue 275–285), never a warm cream/sand. A warm-tinted body is the AI-SaaS tell this system rejects.

rules.name: The Presence-Only Rule
rules.body: Blue, orange, and green belong to live collaborators. The brand indigo is kept off the presence-blue hue so the two never read as the same thing.

rules.name: The Display-For-Display Rule
rules.body: Bricolage Grotesque for headings and the wordmark; Hanken Grotesk for body, labels, and data. Don't mix roles.

rules.name: The Two-Register Rule
rules.body: Flat, state-only motion in the app; layered depth and orchestrated motion on the landing. Don't leak one into the other.

rules.name: The Enhance-Don't-Gate Rule
rules.body: Reveal animations enhance content visible by default; the hidden state is applied by JS only when motion is allowed.

dos: Do keep neutrals cool (a whisper of indigo, chroma ≤0.02 toward hue ~280). Warmth is not this brand.
Do ration brand/iris indigo — primary action and identity only. Most of every screen is neutral.
Do set headings in Bricolage Grotesque and text in Hanken Grotesk.
Do attach a real name label to every presence color; presence must survive color-blindness and grayscale.
Do convey depth by tonal layering in-app; reserve layered shadow + glow for the landing.
Do give every interactive element a visible focus-visible ring and a prefers-reduced-motion fallback.
Do express access control as one switch (private / view / edit) plus one decisive 'make private.'
donts: Don't use a warm cream/sand/beige background — the generic AI-SaaS tell this system rejects.
Don't render anonymous cursors, or use a presence color for anything that isn't a live person; don't let the brand indigo drift onto the presence-blue hue.
Don't fall back to the system-font stack or the Inter/DM-Sans/Space-Grotesk reflex.
Don't build a permission matrix, role tree, or IT-console access panel.
Don't go toy-cute: no bounce/elastic easing, no emoji-as-UI, no oversized radii.
Don't stamp an uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section, or lay out identical icon-card grids.
Don't use border-left/border-right >1px as a colored accent stripe, or gradient-clipped text.
Don't leak landing choreography into app UI, or let a reveal gate content visibility on JS.
